---
name: Issue
about: Report bugs, security issues, and feature requests here
---
Thanks for reporting your issue.

Please make sure these boxes are checked before submitting your issue - thank you!

- [ ] I looked for a similar issue and couldn't find any.
- [ ] I tried with the latest version of GPAC. Installers are available [here](https://gpac.io/downloads/gpac-nightly-builds/).
- [ ] I gave enough information for contributors to reproduce my issue (meaningful title, platform and compiler, command line, input files, etc.).

You can share files anonymously using [this dropbox](https://www.mediafire.com/filedrop/filedrop_hosted.php?drop=eec9e058a9486fe4e99c33021481d9e1826ca9dbc242a6cfaab0fe95da5e5d95).

For security issues, please read our [security policy](https://github.com/gpac/gpac/blob/master/SECURITY.md).

If your findings or reports were generated by AI **please disclose it**. Make sure that the code and commands provided can actually be run. 

---
